trending_videos.title: Cyclops: The Fearless Leader | Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
trending_videos.description:
Husband. Leader. Mutant. 🕶️

As a founding member of the X-Men, Scott Summers is no stranger to hardship and discipline. Having overcome discrimination and tribulation, he stands as an unyielding protector of Mutantkind.

Through his specialized ruby quartz visor, he's able to precisely control the devastating force channeled through his eyes, neutralizing any threat on the battlefield.

Cross him and all restraint disappears, unleashing an unstoppable torrent of concussive energy!

He's the one in charge for a reason. Find out why as Cyclops arrives with Season 8.5 of Marvel Rivals on June 12th!  💥

Play free now on:
 
🔹 Steam: https://t.co/IPhy0Of1cG
🔹 PlayStation: https://t.co/FR0aVfTmcn
🔹 Xbox: https://t.co/GaAYz7Nku6
🔹 Epic Games: https://t.co/QXoxz0VAP7
 
Follow #MarvelRivals for the latest news:
🔹 Discord: https://discord.gg/marvelrivals

🔹 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/marvelrivals/
🔹 TikTo

trending_videos.title: Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026 + Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026
trending_videos.description:
Join us on June 9 at 7am PT / 10am ET for Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026 followed immediately by Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026.
 
The livestream kicks off with Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026, which will run for roughly 50 minutes and highlight upcoming Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch games. Immediately following, Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026 will premiere and last around 95 minutes, showcasing gameplay of select titles featured during the Nintendo Direct.

00:00 - Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026
56:36 - Nintendo Treehouse: Live | June 2026

#NintendoDirect #NintendoTreehouseLive

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

trending_videos.title: End of the Line | Shion Hero Trailer | Overwatch
trending_videos.description:
Time to find out who the streets of Tokyo really belong to.

Join Shion, our newest Hero and the Hashimoto Clan's most terrifying elder, as she battles against Sojourn in our latest Hero Trailer, End of the Line.

Find out what happens next in the Reign of Talon when Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den arrives on June 16.

Overwatch is free to play on PC and console, now including Nintendo Switch™ 2"!

trending_videos.title: Whalefall | Official Teaser | In Theaters October 16
trending_videos.description:
The odds of being swallowed alive by a whale are not zero.

Watch the new teaser for #Whalefall and see the film only in theaters October 16.

Following the death of his father (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) goes diving off the central Coast of California in search of his remains, but is swallowed by a massive sperm whale. While trapped inside its belly with only one hour of oxygen left, Jay comes to realize that the hard-earned lessons his father imparted may be the key to his escape.
